_doctrine_note: Substrate-test fixture per COGOS_PROCESS_DETERMINISM §10.9. NOT a real ARC corpus task. The rule encoded here is 'output = R×C grid filled with the majority non-background color over object cells.' An arc-hybrid-solver with strategy='majority_color_fill' achieves 100% accuracy on every test pair. Background = 0 (ARC convention, PD-I10).
